title: parapholis incurva
intro: Parapholis incurva, also known as the bent grass or curly grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Parapholis incurva include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. It can be prepared as a tea or decoction, or used in herbal remedies such as infusions, tinctures, and poultices.
